title: TardisFlightCore
description: Adds components to the TARDIS for the TARDIS:Refined mod to make it a bit harder to play. Currently there is only a Dematerialization Circuit and an Engine Compartment with a fun repair minigame. I'll add more in due time.
body: TARDIS Flight Core is a small addon for TARDIS: Refined that makes flying a TARDIS a bit harder. It adds an Engine Compartment with a required Dematerialization Circuit. If it’s missing or broken, you’re not going anywhere. Every so often the circuit takes damage, and you’ll have 10 seconds to repair it with the right tool and material before it breaks completely. You'll need the material in your left hand, the tool in your right. I intend to add more later on. Let me know what else I should add!
